what_it_does: This file is a metadata ledger entry that records an image attachment associated with the design-source channel, pointing to an image asset URI and recording when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It has an id of att-62685b31.
standouts: The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/company-info/p-15.
The file is purely a typed, timestamped attachment reference.
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter ledger format with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Separates attachment metadata from the actual image payload.
concerns: The image asset is referenced by an opaque URI with no title, description, alt text, author, or provenance.
There is no checksum, size, or MIME type to verify the referenced asset.
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment record that links the design-source channel to an image asset via a URI.
questions: What does the image at image://design-source/company-info/p-15 depict?
Who added this attachment and for what specific design purpose?
Does the target URI resolve to an existing, versioned asset?
apparent_themes: Separation of metadata from media payload
intention_signals: It appears intended to maintain a durable, typed cross-reference between the design-source channel and a specific image asset for retrieval or audit.
novelty: It uses an image:// URI target within a channel attachment ledger entry, treating an image as a first-class referenced asset.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed link between the design-source channel and image asset p-15, supporting asset discovery, provenance, and retrieval in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment ledger entry with id att-62685b31 that records an images attachment targeting image://design-source/company-info/p-15 in the design-source channel, added on 2026-06-22T11:30:59Z.
intention_for_embedding: It was likely created to catalog and link an image asset to the design-source channel for reference or provenance tracking.
